title: Chambly Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Chambly with a Z-Score of +3.54. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Chambly is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 29%, and wind speed is at 32.5 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
